art_style: Photorealistic cinematic alien-planet documentary, epic IMAX scale and awe, volumetric atmosphere and clouds, dramatic natural lighting with god rays, deep-space backdrop with crisp stars, rich filmic color grading, hyper-detailed terrain, ultra-smooth continuous one-take camera motion with no cuts, vertical 9:16 composition, no people and no faces anywhere (any civilization appears only as distant aerial architecture and lights), no on-screen text, no watermarks.
